sine: noun. In a right triangle, the ratio of the length of the side opposite an angle to the length of the hypotenuse.

snib: noun. A latch or fastening for a door, window etc.

sun: noun. A star, especially when seen as the centre of any single solar system.
suss: noun. Alternative form of soss (“miry place”).
unbe: verb. To deprive (someone or something) of being; to make nonexistent.
bes: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of be

suni: noun. A small antelope of Southern Africa, Nesotragus moschatus.
